plugins.name: co-dialectic
plugins.description: Co-Dialectic v4.20.0 - TRUST THESIS REPAIR. Named-person-claim-grounding semantic gate (PROMPT.md + claude -p judge) BLOCKs unverified biographical/logistical/relational claims about named people (GH #11 CRITICAL — 5 hallucinations in one session). Protocol 3 sharpening adds referent-ambiguity detection. Fixes honesty:undefined cosmetic bug. RELOAD REQUIRED — stale cached plugins on older project scopes run v4.14–v4.16 hooks; reinstall picks up v4.20.0 + retroactively unlocks v4.18 task-first persona routing + v4.19 concise-by-default.

plugins.name: career-os
plugins.description: Career OS v0.27.0 — AI-powered career management system. Persistent memory, session capture, git-versioned data, full privacy. outreach-fact-check (T4 immunity) + interviewer-research (panel prep automation).
